sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: CLSA ETF Analysis: Dividends, Returns TSX:CLSA
feed.summary: This article provides an analysis of the Brompton Split Corp. Enhanced Equity Income ETF Trust Unit A (TSX: CLSA), focusing on its dividends, returns, and key characteristics. It details the fund's objective to provide monthly distributions and capital appreciation by investing in actively managed Split Corp. Class A shares, highlighting its high dividend yield of 10.76% and active management style. The article also covers the fund's structure, exposure type, and answers frequently asked questions regarding its holdings, dividend growth, expense ratio, and issuing company.

feed.title: International Paper to build new $225 million facility in Rankin County
feed.summary: International Paper announced plans to build a new $225 million sustainable packaging facility in Rankin County, Mississippi. The 468,000-square-foot plant, located on an 80-acre site in Brandon, will replace the existing Richland box plant, with construction beginning in June 2026 and operations anticipated in late 2027. This investment aims to modernize the company's manufacturing footprint, strengthen its cost position, and enhance service capabilities across the Mid-South region.

feed.title: Mosaic tumbles as BofA downgrades, seeing Iran war driving inflation in raw materials
feed.summary: BofA Securities downgraded Mosaic (MOS) to Underperform from Neutral due to concerns that a potential war with Iran could drive inflation in raw materials. The bank's analysts believe this scenario poses significant risks for fertilizer and other raw material prices, negatively impacting Mosaic's outlook.

feed.title: -3.14% for Palo Alto Networks stock as momentum stays mixed and short-term pullback risk grows
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) stock experienced a 3.14% drop, trading at $164.41, with mixed momentum signals indicating a short-term bullish bias, neutral medium-term momentum, but ongoing long-term selling pressure. Despite recent leadership appointments and institutional investment, technical analysis suggests heightened volatility and overbought conditions, pointing to a likely range-bound movement between $158.50 and $170.50 with downside risk. Experts warn of consolidation and recommend monitoring the $158.50 support zone, as a breach could lead to further declines.

feed.title: Essex Property Trust (NYSE:ESS) Sets New 1-Year Low - Here's Why
feed.summary: Shares of Essex Property Trust (NYSE:ESS) hit a new 52-week low of $243.08 on Friday, trading around $244.56. The company slightly missed Q4 EPS estimates but beat revenue, issued FY2026 EPS guidance, and increased its quarterly dividend to $2.59, representing a 4.3% yield. Analysts have a consensus "Hold" rating with a target price of $282.00, despite some recent downgrades and target cuts.

feed.title: Omnicom Group (NYSE:OMC) Price Target Raised to $114.00
feed.summary: UBS Group has raised its price target for Omnicom Group (NYSE:OMC) to $114.00 from $108.00, maintaining a "buy" rating despite the company missing its latest quarterly earnings estimates. Omnicom reported EPS of $2.59 against an estimate of $2.94 and revenue of $5.53 billion against $7.58 billion, though revenue was up 27.9% year-over-year. The board also authorized a significant $5.0 billion stock buyback program, representing up to 38.1% of shares, indicating management's belief that the stock, currently trading around $75.06, is undervalued.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Class Action Lawsuit Filed on Behalf of
feed.summary: Holzer & Holzer, LLC has filed a class action lawsuit against Concorde International Group, Ltd. (CIGL) on behalf of investors who suffered significant losses. The lawsuit alleges that Concorde engaged in a fraudulent stock promotion scheme through social media, with insiders coordinating share dumping during a price inflation campaign. Investors who purchased shares between April 21, 2025, and July 14, 2025, are encouraged to contact the firm by May 18, 2026, to discuss their legal rights.

feed.title: Is Host Hotels & Resorts Stock Outperforming the Dow?
feed.summary: Host Hotels & Resorts Inc. (HST) has demonstrated strong performance, with its stock rising 2.1% over the past three months and 6.5% YTD, significantly outpacing the Dow Jones Industrials Average's nearly 5% drop and 4.9% decrease, respectively. The company reported robust Q4 and full-year 2025 results, including increased revenue, net income, and optimistic 2026 guidance. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for HST, projecting a 12.3% premium to current levels.

feed.title: Hershey Touts Reese’s March Madness Push As ONE Hershey Debuts
feed.summary: The Hershey Company is launching a significant Reese's March Madness campaign to boost brand visibility, alongside the introduction of its new "ONE Hershey" operating model. This new model aims to integrate its Sweet, Salty, and Protein brands to enhance consumer reach and refine its go-to-market strategy. These initiatives are designed to reinforce Hershey's leadership in the snacking industry by leveraging a core brand and streamlining commercial operations across its expanded product portfolio.

feed.title: Vulcan Materials Co stock faces headwinds amid infrastructure boom and analyst upgrades on NYSE
feed.summary: Vulcan Materials Co (VMC), a leading US aggregates producer, is gaining investor attention due to robust demand from US infrastructure projects, despite its shares not reaching peak levels. Analysts like Citigroup have upgraded price targets, reflecting confidence in the company's position as federal spending on highways and bridges accelerates. The stock offers a defensive investment opportunity for DACH investors, providing stability against European residential slowdowns and benefiting from a strong USD.

feed.title: 150% Leveraged Buffered PLUS on EFA — Morgan Stanley (MS) Pricing Supplement
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley Finance LLC is offering Buffered PLUS principal-at-risk securities linked to the iShares MSCI EAFE ETF (EFA). These securities, maturing on March 22, 2029, provide 150% leveraged upside exposure to the ETF's appreciation up to a maximum payment of $1,502, while offering principal protection down to 90% of the initial level. Investors bear credit risk of Morgan Stanley and face potential losses if the ETF declines beyond the 10% buffer.

feed.title: Tim Cook’s China visit reinforces country’s importance to Apple as global frictions rise
feed.summary: Apple CEO Tim Cook visited Chengdu, China, for an Apple Store event, highlighting the country's continued importance to the tech giant despite rising U.S.-China tensions. Apple recently cut its App Store commission in China responding to regulatory pressure, and saw a significant 23% jump in iPhone sales early 2026 even as the broader Chinese smartphone market declined. The company is relying on its strong iPhone performance in China as it seeks to develop a clearer growth strategy in artificial intelligence.

feed.title: Mettler-Toledo (MTD) Upgraded to Buy by Jefferies, Price Target Raised
feed.summary: Jefferies has upgraded Mettler-Toledo (MTD) from Hold to Buy, raising its price target to $1,450, citing the company's strong growth potential, operational discipline, and attractive valuation. The company demonstrated robust financial health with expanding margins and consistent revenue growth in Q4 2025, although its high debt-to-equity ratio warrants monitoring. Despite a premium valuation and recent insider selling, MTD shows strong overall financial health and confidence from large institutional investors.

feed.title: AMD stock drops as technical resistance and weak trend dominate session
feed.summary: AMD stock experienced a 2.02% daily decline, settling at $201.13, primarily due to technical resistance and a weak market trend. The stock is currently consolidating between short-term support at $200 and resistance around $204, with mixed momentum indicators suggesting indecisive price action. Analysts anticipate continued sideways movement unless there's a significant breakout above $204 or a fall below $200.

feed.title: A Look At CoStar Group (CSGP) Valuation After Homes.com Pre‑Market Listings And New Board Appointment
feed.summary: CoStar Group (CSGP) has introduced pre-market listings on Homes.com and appointed Nana Banerjee to its board, despite a significant share price decline over the past year. Analysts view the stock as potentially undervalued, with a fair value of $65.42 against a current price of $42.82, even though its price-to-sales ratio is higher than the industry average. Investors are prompted to review the data to assess whether current investments will translate into future growth, considering both the potential upside and prevailing risks.

feed.title: BMO accelerates U.S. growth, seeing path to reach target quicker
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal is aggressively expanding its U.S. operations by hiring bankers, opening and revamping branches, and developing its wealth-advisement business. The bank aims to achieve a 12% return on equity from its U.S. business by the end of 2027, an acceleration from previous targets. This expansion follows BMO's US$16.3 billion acquisition of Bank of the West three years ago, with a focus on improving performance in inherited branches and leveraging artificial intelligence.

feed.title: Uber faces class action for allegedly misleading riders with inaccurate arrival times
feed.summary: Uber Technologies is being sued in a class action lawsuit alleging it misleads customers about arrival times for its rideshare services. Plaintiff Lucy Ye claims Uber advertises precise arrival times, particularly for its “Faster” options, but frequently fails to deliver, leading customers to pay a premium for a service they don't receive. The lawsuit, filed in California federal court, alleges violations of state consumer laws, unjust enrichment, and fraud, seeking to represent all U.S. customers who paid for a ride advertised as "Faster" or with a specific arrival time but were not picked up within that time.

feed.title: Insider Transaction: Patrick Dumont Sells $3.29M Worth Of Las Vegas Sands Shares
feed.summary: Patrick Dumont, Chairman & CEO of Las Vegas Sands (NYSE: LVS), sold 60,165 shares of the company worth $3,294,033, as per an SEC filing. Despite the insider sale, Las Vegas Sands shows strong financial health with 26.0% revenue growth, a 48.45% gross margin, and a market capitalization above the industry average, though its debt-to-equity ratio is high. The article emphasizes that while insider transactions are not the sole factor for investment decisions, they can provide important insights.

feed.title: Diamondback Energy EVP Trades $781K In Company Stock
feed.summary: Matt Zmigrosky, EVP at Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ: FANG), sold 4,101 shares of the company's stock for a total value of $781,292, as reported in a recent SEC filing. The article also provides financial details about Diamondback Energy, noting a decline in revenue, a low debt-to-equity ratio, and a market capitalization that surpasses industry averages. Insider transactions, while not the sole determinant of investment choices, offer valuable insights into a company's financial health and future prospects.

feed.title: Diamondback Energy Director Trades $1.13M In Company Stock
feed.summary: A director at Diamondback Energy, Steven E West, sold 6,000 shares of company stock worth $1.13 million on March 19, as reported in an SEC filing. Despite this insider sell, investors should consider various factors when evaluating insider transactions. Diamondback Energy faces revenue growth challenges with a -9.61% decline as of December 2025 but maintains a prudent financial strategy with a low debt-to-equity ratio of 0.4.

feed.title: Apple's App Store growth slows slightly while iPhone demand jumps: Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley and Sensor Tower data indicate a slight slowdown in Apple's App Store revenue growth this month. Despite this, there is strong demand for iPhones, evidenced by a year-over-year increase in iPhone builds. The article highlights these contrasting trends within Apple's ecosystem.

feed.title: Molina Healthcare of Michigan and The MolinaCares Accord Donate $135,000 to Senior Centers to Pilot Programs Addressing Social Isolation
feed.summary: Molina Healthcare of Michigan and The MolinaCares Accord have donated $135,000 to the Michigan Association of Senior Centers to combat social isolation among seniors. This funding will support 21 member organizations in developing programs like digital literacy, arts, and transportation services. The initiative aims to address the significant health risks associated with loneliness in aging adults.

feed.title: Recent Report Shows That Sen. A. Mitchell Mcconnell, Jr. Bought Up to $15K Worth of Wells Fargo Stock
feed.summary: Senator A. Mitchell McConnell, Jr. recently purchased Wells Fargo (NYSE: WFC) stock worth between $1,001 and $15,000, as detailed in a March 2026 filing. This transaction is part of 15 trades totaling over $78,000 executed by the Senator in the past three years, also including Luminar Technologies stock. The article emphasizes that such congressional transactions, while not the sole basis for investment decisions, can offer insights into a stock's potential performance due to the STOCK Act's disclosure requirements.

feed.title: Trump approves up to 10 GW of NextEra gas power projects in Texas
feed.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump has approved the development of up to 10 gigawatts of natural gas-fired power generation in Texas and Pennsylvania. This move is part of a broader U.S.-Japan trade agreement, with Japan committing $550 billion in investments. The projects, to be jointly owned by U.S. and Japanese stakeholders and operated by NextEra, aim to meet increasing electricity demand from data centers and advanced manufacturing without raising household power bills.

feed.title: Generac Is Up 47% Year to Date. Here’s Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
feed.summary: Generac Holdings Inc. (GNRC) has seen its stock rise 47% year-to-date in 2026, driven by increasing demand for its commercial and industrial generators due to data center expansion. Despite a decline in residential generator sales, strong performance in the commercial sector led by data center orders suggests an "inflection point" for the company. Analysts project a target price of $253, implying a 26% upside, based on reaccelerating revenue growth and an improving business mix away from volatile residential demand.

feed.title: Longeviti Neuro Solutions Appoints T. Rowe Price CEO Robert W. Sharps to Board of Directors
feed.summary: Longeviti Neuro Solutions has appointed Robert W. Sharps, CEO and President of T. Rowe Price Group, Inc., to its Board of Directors. Sharps brings extensive experience in global asset management, capital markets, and corporate governance to the neurotechnology company. His appointment is expected to strengthen Longeviti's strategic planning and accelerate its clinical, commercial, and platform expansion initiatives.

feed.title: Is Evergy Stock Outperforming the S&P 500?
feed.summary: Evergy Inc. (EVRG) has significantly outperformed the S&P 500 Index ($SPX) across various timeframes, including the past three months, year-to-date, and the past 52 weeks. The utility company, valued at $18.7 billion, focuses on reliable electricity generation with an increasing emphasis on renewable sources and has received a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts. Despite a slight dip after its Q4 earnings report, Evergy maintains a strong long-term outlook with positive EPS growth and future guidance.

feed.title: Pinnacle West (NYSE: PNW) CEO gets stock award, gifts shares to trust
feed.summary: Pinnacle West Capital CEO Theodore N. Geisler received 24,287 shares from the vesting of 2023 performance shares. Following this, 2,897 shares were returned to the company for cash settlement, and 8,954 shares were withheld for tax obligations. Geisler then gifted 12,436 shares to a revocable family trust, resulting in his direct holdings falling to zero and indirect holdings through the trust increasing to 50,003 shares.

feed.title: Packaging Corp of America stock faces headwinds from Iran war supply disruptions and institutional buying
feed.summary: Packaging Corp of America (NYSE: PKG) is experiencing stock pressure due to geopolitical tensions from the Iran war, leading to increased fuel and material costs for the packaging industry. Despite this, institutional investors like CIBC Bancorp are accumulating shares, and analysts anticipate that the cost hikes may be temporary. The company, which specializes in fiber-based packaging, is seen as a resilient play for investors, particularly those in the DACH region.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company Boosts Darden Restaurants (NYSE:DRI) Price Target to $210.00
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has increased its price target for Darden Restaurants (NYSE:DRI) to $210.00, maintaining an "equal weight" rating, after the company slightly beat Q3 estimates and raised guidance. Broader analyst sentiment remains positive, with a consensus price target of $225.67, driven by strong Q3 results, analyst bullishness, and continued capital returns through dividends and share buybacks. However, some risks were flagged, including insider selling and one-time charges related to brand impairment and weather.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company Lowers Sonoco Products (NYSE:SON) Price Target to $56.00
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has lowered its price target for Sonoco Products (NYSE:SON) from $60.00 to $56.00, maintaining an "equal weight" rating, which implies a potential 9.4% upside. Analyst consensus for Sonoco is mixed, with four "Buy" and six "Hold" ratings, and an average target price of $62.13. The company recently exceeded quarterly EPS expectations with significant revenue growth.

feed.title: Sprite’s 'It’s That Fresh' Platform Turns Refreshment Into A Multi-Sensory Experience
feed.summary: Sprite is launching its "It's That Fresh" global platform, expanding its brand identity beyond visuals to incorporate sound, music, and cultural touchpoints for a multi-sensory refreshment experience. Led by Oana Vlad, VP of Global Brand Strategy, the initiative blends product innovation with street culture and sonic branding, featuring a "Sprite Sound" created with DJ Mustard. The strategy also focuses on consumer-led innovation, cultural experiences, and live activations, including a partnership with the NBA, to connect authentically with Gen Z.

feed.title: Florida power customers can get mid-cycle bill estimates before heat rises
feed.summary: Duke Energy Florida is promoting its Usage Alerts program to help customers monitor electricity use and anticipate monthly bills, especially as summer heat increases energy consumption. Customers with smart meters and an email address are automatically enrolled, receiving mid-cycle estimates to allow adjustments and avoid bill surprises. This initiative aims to provide billing visibility and support customers in managing their energy costs.

feed.title: Cadeler Nexra Wins Japan Offshore Wind O&M Contract for Spring 2026 - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Cadeler's dedicated offshore wind operations and maintenance unit, Nexra, has secured a new O&M contract in Japan, set to begin in Spring 2026 and last one to two months. This project will utilize the "Wind Zaratan" vessel after its maintenance in Singapore. This is Nexra's second significant O&M contract this year, following a €20 million deal for work on two Taiwanese offshore wind farms also starting in March 2026.

feed.title: What is behind Canadian Natural Resources stock's recent drop in value today
feed.summary: Canadian Natural Resources (CNQ) experienced a 2.23% daily decline, trading at C$67.95, despite strong Q4 and FY2025 results and an increased 2026 production forecast and dividend. Analysts highlight that while the stock remains bullish and above key moving averages, it is currently in overbought conditions, with mixed institutional flows and broader market selling contributing to the recent dip. Experts suggest a potential short-term retracement due to profit-taking or souring market sentiment, with key support levels around C$62.

feed.title: Pinnacle West (PNW) CFO logs performance share grant and tax withholding
feed.summary: Pinnacle West Capital's SVP & CFO, Andrew D. Cooper, reported equity compensation activity, receiving 18,177 shares as a grant for 2023 performance share awards. On the same date, 2,160 shares were disposed for cash settlement of dividend-equivalent rights, and 6,704 shares were withheld for tax obligations. After these transactions, Cooper directly held 29,053 shares of PNW common stock.

feed.title: [ARS] CNA FINANCIAL CORP SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an ARS SEC filing by CNA FINANCIAL CORP (CNA) on March 20, 2026, indicating a neutral sentiment and low impact. It provides key details about the filing, links to the original document, and includes an overview of CNA's stock data and recent news and SEC filings.

feed.title: CNA Financial : 2025 Annual Report 2026 Proxy
feed.summary: CNA Financial has published its 2025 Annual Report and 2026 Proxy Statement, detailing the agenda for its upcoming Annual Meeting of Stockholders on April 29, 2026. Key proposals include the election of directors, an advisory vote on executive compensation, approval to increase authorized shares for its Incentive Compensation Plan, and the ratification of Deloitte & Touche LLP as independent public accountants. The report also provides extensive details on executive compensation, corporate governance, and financial performance measures, including the company's "CI" (adjusted operating income).

feed.title: Core Natural Resources SVP, CLO & Corp. Sec. Sold Shares Worth Over $1.6M
feed.summary: Rosemary L. Klein, SVP, CLO & Corp. Sec. at Core Natural Resources, sold 15,000 shares of Common Stock on March 19, 2026, for a total of $1,603,100. The shares were sold at prices of $105.00 and $110.62, resulting in a weighted average price of $106.87 per share. Following these transactions, Klein directly owns 53,679 shares, including 11,045 unvested restricted stock units.

feed.title: Core Natural Resources (CNR) SVP Klein sells 15,000 shares, keeps 53,679
feed.summary: Rosemary L. Klein, SVP, CLO & Corporate Secretary of Core Natural Resources, sold a total of 15,000 shares of company common stock on March 19, 2026, in two separate open-market transactions at prices of $105.00 and $110.62 per share. Following these sales, Klein still holds a significant stake of 53,679 shares, which includes 11,045 unvested restricted stock units, demonstrating continued alignment with shareholder interests despite the sales.

feed.title: Klein, Core Natural Resources SVP, sells $1.6m in stock
feed.summary: Rosemary L. Klein, SVP of Core Natural Resources (CNR), sold 15,000 shares of common stock for a total of $1,603,100 in two separate transactions on March 19, 2026. Following these sales, Klein directly owns 53,679 shares, including restricted stock units. Separately, Core Natural Resources temporarily shut down its Mountaineer II mine due to elevated methane levels but promptly addressed the issue with no reported injuries.

feed.title: Columbus McKinnon stock faces pressure amid divestiture adjustments and leverage metrics in industri
feed.summary: Columbus McKinnon's stock is experiencing pressure due to recent divestitures and adjustments to its financial metrics. The company's Credit Agreement Adjusted EBITDA and net leverage are key areas of focus for investors, especially given its valuation at a P/E of 50.6x compared to the sector average of 31.0x. DACH investors are particularly interested in its exposure to automation and infrastructure demand within the European manufacturing sector.

feed.title: Wall Street analysts see an 86.45% upside in Biodesix (BDSX): Can the stock really move this high?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Biodesix (BDSX) stock, highlighting a consensus "Buy" rating from Wall Street analysts and a significant projected upside of 86.45%. It discusses the average price target of $4.67 and outlines each analyst's specific rating and price target, providing context to the optimistic outlook despite recent stock volatility. The piece also includes key performance data and upcoming earnings information for investors to consider.

feed.title: Clean Energy Fuels stock faces pressure amid renewable fuel market shifts and analyst scrutiny
feed.summary: Clean Energy Fuels (CLNE), a leading renewable natural gas (RNG) provider, is experiencing stock volatility due to market shifts, despite analysts maintaining a "moderate buy" consensus. The company's financials indicate profitability pressures typical for growth-stage clean energy firms, with a 12-month price target averaging $3.59. Investors are eyeing its potential amid growing demand for RNG in heavy-duty trucking and its strategic positioning in the energy transition.

feed.title: How to Take an Ineos Grenadier for an Extended Test Drive: Rent One From Hertz
feed.summary: Hertz will soon offer the Ineos Grenadier, a luxury off-road SUV, for rent at 21 major U.S. airports starting in the spring. This initiative allows interested shoppers to take an extended test drive of the vehicle, which is a modern homage to the early Land Rover Defender. The Fieldmaster trim Grenadiers will be available for approximately $130 per day, allowing consumers to experience its unique design and BMW-powered drivetrain.

feed.title: Barclays Bank PLC (ATMP) priced Buffered Supertrack notes, Oct 2027 maturity
feed.summary: Barclays Bank PLC has priced Buffered Supertrack SM Notes, linked to the S&P 500 Index, with a maturity date of October 5, 2027. These notes offer full principal protection if the S&P 500's return is between 0% and -10% and a maximum return of 13.60% with a 2.00x upside leverage factor. Investors face credit risk from Barclays and the potential exercise of U.K. Bail-in Power.

feed.title: TSN SEC Filings - Tyson Foods 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides comprehensive access to Tyson Foods (TSN) SEC filings, including 10-K, 10-Q, and 8-K forms, alongside insider trading reports. It details how investors can review financial results, governance practices, and material events, with AI-powered summaries to highlight key points. Recent filings covered include director stock awards and the results of the 2026 Annual Meeting.

feed.title: Can AT&T's App to Enhance Customer Satisfaction Drive Growth?
feed.summary: AT&T has launched a new app designed to improve customer experience by unifying wireless and home Internet services, featuring AI support and enhanced controls. This initiative aims to simplify digital interactions and foster healthier digital habits among users. The article also compares AT&T's digital platform strategy with competitors like Verizon and T-Mobile, and provides an analysis of AT&T's stock performance and valuation.

feed.title: Here’s What You Should Understand Besides the Reasons PulteGroup, Inc. (PHM) is Gaining Attention
feed.summary: PulteGroup (PHM) has seen its shares decline by 15.6% in the past month, underperforming the broader market and homebuilding sector. Despite revenue and EPS consistently beating expectations in the last four quarters, future earnings and revenue projections show mixed trends, with a forecasted earnings decline for the current quarter but an increase for next year. The stock currently holds a Zacks Rank #4 (Sell), suggesting a less favorable near-term outlook, although its valuation metrics indicate it might be trading at a discount.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Maintains Kimco Realty Corp(KIM.US) With Hold Rating, Raises Target Price to $25
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs analyst Caitlin Burrows has maintained a Hold rating for Kimco Realty Corp (KIM.US) while increasing the target price from $23 to $25. This adjustment is based on TipRanks data, which indicates the analyst has a 56.6% success rate and a -0.8% average return over the past year. The information is provided for informational and educational purposes and is not investment advice.
